---
title: "Establish research teams & make a Git repo"
subtitle: "Week 2 Lab"
image: "lab_loading.png"

draft: false

about:
  id: description
  template: trestles
  image: "lab_loading.png"
  
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true  
---

::: {#description}
#### Learning Goals:

1.  Tour the lab equipment

2.  Establish a research team

3.  Make a team GitHub repo and upload LOI
:::

# 3. Make a team GitHub repository (repo)

# Bonus

## YouTube Videos

{{< video https://youtu.be/e-EBXzDc1Bk?si=tcMcqODFxvSeSm6o >}}

{{< https://youtu.be/ZLvzVSy-6BY?si=hE5W1Sx2WFsgujVS >}}

- [Green Crab Invasion Hits Puget Sound](https://youtu.be/52NkcbA1FVY?si=Fgxi1avkgwQKFFQM)

- [Sea otters credited with solving Elkhorn Slough's invasive green crab problem]()
